content_types.name: Demo
content_types.description: Showing a tool, feature, or product in action

content_types.name: Tutorial
content_types.description: Step-by-step teaching content the viewer can follow along with

content_types.name: Hot Take
content_types.description: Controversial opinion or contrarian perspective to spark debate

content_types.name: News / Reaction
content_types.description: Reacting to or reporting on industry news, launches, or updates

content_types.name: Comparison
content_types.description: Comparing two or more tools, strategies, or approaches

content_types.name: Story / Case Study
content_types.description: Personal experience, client result, or narrative-driven content

content_types.name: CTA / Offer
content_types.description: Direct call-to-action content promoting a service, lead magnet, or offer

visual_formats.name: Talking Head
visual_formats.description: Speaker on camera delivering content directly to viewer

visual_formats.name: Screen Recording
visual_formats.description: Screen capture showing software, dashboards, or workflows

visual_formats.name: Split Screen
visual_formats.description: Speaker in corner with screen recording or B-roll filling the rest

visual_formats.name: B-Roll / Faceless
visual_formats.description: Stock footage or cinematic B-roll with voiceover — no face on camera

visual_formats.name: Text Only / Kinetic
visual_formats.description: Animated text on screen with music — no speaker or screen recording

visual_formats.name: Mixed
visual_formats.description: Combination of talking head, screen recording, and B-roll in one video

visual_formats.name: Product Demo
visual_formats.description: Focused product walkthrough showing specific features and results

hook_structures.name: Secret Reveal
hook_structures.description: Promises insider knowledge the viewer doesn't have yet
hook_structures.example: The cold email trick that got me 47 meetings in 30 days

hook_structures.name: Educational
hook_structures.description: Teaches something specific and actionable upfront
hook_structures.pattern: How to [achieve result] in [timeframe] without [common pain]
hook_structures.example: How to set up cold email in 15 minutes without buying domains

hook_structures.name: Contrarian
hook_structures.description: Goes against what everyone believes to be true
hook_structures.pattern: [Common belief] is wrong. Here's what [works/is true] instead
hook_structures.example: Personalization in cold email is a waste of time. Here's why

hook_structures.name: Question
hook_structures.description: Opens with a question that triggers curiosity
hook_structures.pattern: Why are [group] still [doing wrong thing] when [better way] exists?
hook_structures.example: Why are agencies still manually finding leads when AI does it for free?

hook_structures.name: Raw Shock
hook_structures.description: Opens with a surprising number, result, or statement
hook_structures.pattern: [Shocking number/result] — and I did it with [simple method]
hook_structures.example: $47,000 in one month from cold email alone

hook_structures.name: Experimentation
hook_structures.description: Shows a test or experiment with real results
hook_structures.example: I sent 10,000 cold emails in 7 days. Here's what happened

hook_structures.name: Comparison
hook_structures.description: Pits two things against each other for a clear winner
hook_structures.pattern: [Option A] vs [Option B] — which one [wins/converts/works] better?
hook_structures.example: Instantly vs Smartlead — which sends better cold emails in 2026?
